name: Large British Building Society
description: A UK-based financial services organisation undergoing a comprehensive AI and data transformation programme to modernise its data estate, establish an AI Centre of Excellence, and implement robust data governance to drive measurable business impact and regulatory compliance.
context: Case Study: Large British Building Society
The organisation recognised the transformative potential of Generative AI but lacked a centralised structure to experiment responsibly
The organisation operated a fragmented legacy data landscape comprising MS SQL-based data warehouses

name: AI & Data Transformation Programme
description: A comprehensive three-pillar engagement focused on establishing an AI Centre of Excellence, migrating to a modern data platform, and implementing robust data governance to drive measurable business impact, reduce costs, and build a scalable foundation for AI-driven innovation.
context: This case study documents a comprehensive AI and Data transformation programme spanning three strategic pillars
The programme has delivered measurable business impact across all three pillars, reducing costs, improving compliance, and building a scalable foundation for AI-driven innovation

name: AI Centre of Excellence
description: A dedicated organisational structure and operating model established to govern AI experimentation, standardise delivery processes, and scale proven use cases into production while embedding responsible AI practices from inception.
context: AI Centre of Excellence - Established GenAI CoE

The organisation recognised the transformative potential of Generative AI but lacked a centralised structure to experiment responsibly, govern AI deployments, and scale proven use cases into production

name: Modern Data Platform
description: A cloud-native data architecture built on Azure and Databricks, replacing legacy systems to enable scalable data processing, advanced analytics, and AI initiatives through a medallion lakehouse architecture.
context: Modern Data Platform - Azure + Databricks + dbt
Cloud-native architecture improving data accessibility & agility

name: Responsible AI Governance
description: Framework and practices ensuring ethical, secure, and compliant AI deployment, including threat modelling, PII redaction, model risk evaluation, and operational governance to mitigate deployment risks.
context: Responsible AI practices embedded from inception: threat modelling, PII redaction, model risk evaluation
Governance - Operational model - Responsible AI

name: Data Mastering & Analytics
description: Capability to consolidate fragmented customer data into a single authoritative view, enabling advanced segmentation, personalisation, and self-service BI for business consumers and external systems.
context: Customer data mastering
Foundation for self-service BI and advanced customer analytics

name: Data Lineage & Reconciliation Controls
description: End-to-end tracing of Critical Data Elements across systems and functional areas to ensure compliance, accuracy, and operational risk mitigation through defined reconciliation controls.
context: 205 CDEs traced end-to-end
Reconciliation controls defined
inability to trace data lineage end-to-end posed regulatory and operational risks

name: Complaints Letter Writing (CRAiG)
description: GenAI-driven solution that drafts bespoke customer complaint letters, reducing manual drafting time from 40 minutes to under 5 minutes with human review, while ensuring PII redaction and model monitoring.
context: Use Case 1: Complaints Letter Writing (CRAiG)
GenAI drafts letter, human reviews in <5 mins
Piloted Feb–Sep 2024, graduated to production

name: Call Transcript Analytics
description: AI-powered analysis of customer call recordings for automated summarisation, root cause extraction, and nuanced sentiment/emotion detection beyond traditional NLP/ML capabilities.
context: Use Case 2: Call Transcript Analytics
Automated call summarisation. Root cause & areas-of-interest extraction
Emotion detection with detailed reasoning

name: QA/QC AI Assist
description: GenAI-enabled call screening and compliance checking that scaled coverage from 5% manual to 100% automated, delivering a step-change in quality assurance and regulatory compliance.
context: Use Case 3: QA/QC AI Assist
Scaled call screening from 5% manual to 100% GenAI-enabled
Automated compliance checking

name: Fraud Analysis PoC
description: Proof of concept exploring GenAI applications for identifying and analysing fraudulent activities within customer data, part of a broader pipeline of 10+ use cases across customer and IT operations domains.
context: Fraud Analysis PoC & pilot
Pipeline of 10+ use cases across Customer, Colleague and IT Operations domains

name: ~90% Reduction in Letter Drafting Time
description: Significant time savings achieved through GenAI automation of complaint letter generation, drastically reducing manual effort and accelerating response times for customer complaints.
context: ~90% time savings on complaints letters
Reduction in letter drafting time

name: >30% Faster Code Development
description: Accelerated development and testing cycles for data pipelines and transformations, validated through GenAI-accelerated techniques and fast-tracked delivery against stringent timelines.
context: >30% faster code development via GenAI
Reduction in code build & test
Fast-tracked delivery against stringent timelines

name: Infrastructure Cost Reduction
description: Lowered operational and licensing expenses through decommissioning of legacy mainframe systems and high-cost Teradata infrastructure, freeing budget for innovation and modernisation.
context: Decommissioning of legacy mainframe systems, significantly lowering infrastructure costs
High licensing costs
Freed budget for innovation and modernisation

name: 100% Call Screening Coverage
description: Complete automation of call quality assurance and compliance checking, replacing limited manual sampling and delivering a step-change in quality assurance coverage.
context: 100% Call screening coverage
Step-change in quality assurance coverage

name: Fragmented Legacy Data Landscape
description: Disconnected data warehouses, marts, and mainframe systems creating silos, technical debt, and limited accessibility for analytics, hindering advanced data processing and AI readiness.
context: The organisation operated a fragmented legacy data landscape comprising MS SQL-based data warehouses, Teradata-based data marts, and mainframe-hosted Customer Information Systems
Manual, siloed data processes

name: Lack of Centralised AI Governance
description: Absence of a coordinated structure for responsible AI experimentation, leading to fragmented initiatives, inconsistent quality standards, and inability to demonstrate measurable business value from AI investments.
context: lacked a centralised structure to experiment responsibly, govern AI deployments, and scale proven use cases into production
risk of fragmented AI initiatives, inconsistent quality standards, and inability to demonstrate measurable business value from AI investments

name: Data Lineage Visibility Gap
description: Inability to trace Critical Data Elements across 78+ systems, creating compliance risks and data quality gaps in sensitive areas like Eco Crime and Payments Screening.
context: lacked visibility into how Critical Data Elements (CDEs) flowed across 78+ systems and 6 functional areas
inability to trace data lineage end-to-end posed regulatory and operational risks

name: Azure
description: Microsoft cloud platform serving as the foundational infrastructure for the modern data lakehouse, data factory orchestration, and AI services enabling scalable data processing.
context: Azure + Databricks + dbt
Migrated mainframe CIS to modern data lakehouse on Azure

name: Databricks
description: Unified data analytics platform used to consolidate Teradata assets and host the medallion architecture for data processing, AI workloads, and accelerated code development.
context: Consolidating all data assets from Teradata Vantage to Databricks on Azure
Azure + Databricks + dbt

name: dbt
description: Transformation workflow tool used to build modular, version-controlled, and tested data models within the lakehouse architecture, ensuring rigorous data quality through testing and validation.
context: Modular, reusable, version-controlled dbt models
Rigorous DQ through testing and validation in dbt

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI-powered coding assistant leveraged to accelerate Teradata-to-dbt conversion and validate accelerated delivery approaches, enabling faster code build and test cycles.
context: GenAI-based techniques and assets using GitHub CoPilot to accelerate Teradata-to-dbt conversion
Validated GenAI-accelerated approach for time-to-value

name: Teradata Vantage
description: Legacy enterprise data warehouse system containing complex stored procedures and high licensing costs, targeted for migration to Databricks on Azure.
context: Teradata Vantage - Enterprise data warehouses
Complex stored procedures

name: Unisys Mainframe
description: Legacy mainframe infrastructure hosting Customer Information Systems (CIS), targeted for decommissioning and migration to cloud to reduce technical debt and infrastructure costs.
context: Customer Information Systems on Unisys mainframe
Ending Unisys reliance – migrating customer data and FC/RC feeds to SAP

name: GenAI-Accelerated Migration Approach
description: Use of AI-powered coding assistants and validated PoCs to fast-track complex data migrations, delivering milestones ahead of schedule and validating accelerated approaches for time-to-value.
context: Validated GenAI-accelerated approach for time-to-value
Medallion Architecture Bronze milestone delivered ahead of schedule

name: Federated Governance Model
description: Scalable AI operating model combining centralised oversight with distributed execution, supported by API management and model monitoring to enable a pipeline of 10+ use cases across multiple domains.
context: Scalable AI platform with federated governance, API management and model monitoring

name: SAP
description: Enterprise software vendor whose systems are integrated with the new data lakehouse for customer data feeds and operational systems, replacing legacy mainframe dependencies.
context: Fragmented across CIS, SAP and operational systems
migrating customer data and FC/RC feeds to SAP

name: Reconciliation Controls
description: A set of automated controls that validate data at both the critical data element and interface levels. It includes record counting, field matching, error threshold monitoring, and auto-halt mechanisms with detailed logging to ensure data integrity.
context: Reconciliation Controls
CDE-level: record count, field value & format matching
Interface-level: job control, error thresholds, alerting
